_comment: P36 connector/API changelog monitors. Load: python3 tools/source_currency.py seed-sources canonical-sources/api-changelog-seed.json. Each names the best token-free signal in _signal (git-atom = a public releases/commits Atom feed; rss = native feed; sha256 = ETag/If-Modified-Since + content hash). These feed the connector registry + integrations engine embedded_fact_files so an upstream API change flags the prose that advertises the old version.
name: Gmail API release notes (Atom feed)
extraction_hint: new dated entries: quota-model changes, deprecations, new endpoints; the feed's newest pubDate is the freshness signal

name: Google Drive API release notes
extraction_hint: Drive v3 additive changes and deprecations; verify the per-page Subscribe feed slug, else ETag+sha256 of the dated entry list

name: Google Sheets API release notes
extraction_hint: Sheets v4 changes; the cross-surface task/freshness store writes append rows here, so field/quota changes matter

name: Pinterest OpenAPI spec releases (GitHub)
extraction_hint: each release documents added endpoints and marks breaking changes; the raw OpenAPI in the repo is the authoritative v5 surface

name: Microsoft Graph metadata (CSDL) commit feed
extraction_hint: schema/property changes in the annotated CSDL catch breaks the prose changelog may lag; pair with the changelog RSS

name: EasyPost client library releases (GitHub)
extraction_hint: mirrors the dated YYYY.MM.DD API versions and carrier decommissions; backs the shipments carrier connector

name: Ship24 tracking API OpenAPI spec
extraction_hint: Ship24 publishes no changelog; sha256 the OpenAPI YAML to detect endpoint/field changes (the only reliable signal)

name: YouTube Analytics API revision history (Atom feed)
extraction_hint: report-version bumps and metric changes (engaged_views, Shorts view redefinition); dated structured entries
